summary: Correct the README M4 progress table so the thumbnail and AI rows distinguish implemented focused foundations from still-pending UI and hosted acceptance evidence.

decisions.decision: State the completed thumbnail and AI foundations explicitly while naming the remaining UI, hosted-walkthrough, and acceptance-gate work instead of labeling either slice complete.
decisions.rationale: N-7 requires visitor-facing status claims to match retained evidence and to avoid both stale under-reporting and premature completion claims.

testEvidence.criterion: The status correction is a clean documentation-only change with valid provenance.
testEvidence.test: Run repository diff and provenance validation after the README edit.

red.outcome: RED: the stale README row was identified during review; no executable test was expected to fail for this documentation-only correction.

green.outcome: GREEN: diff check exited 0; provenance ledger passed validation.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
